domains.name: ui-ux
domains.description: UI/UX: Arbre de Vie, Calendar, Bestiole wheel

tasks.title: UI Arbre de Vie (page 4 Hub)
tasks.description: Implementer l'arbre de progression visuel sur la page 4 du Hub. Affiche les noeuds debloques, les connexions, et les bonus actifs du joueur.

tasks.title: Refonte calendrier UI
tasks.description: Refactorer l'interface du calendrier pour integrer les saisons, les evenements et la timeline visuelle.

domains.name: gameplay
domains.description: Gameplay core: Souffle perks, Archetype, Aspects, progression

tasks.title: Souffle d'Ogham -> Perk personnalisable
tasks.description: Transformer le Souffle en systeme de perks. Le joueur choisit des bonus passifs lies aux Oghams debloques. Chaque perk coute du Souffle et offre un avantage contextuel.

tasks.title: Archetype -> bonus DC + contexte RAG
tasks.description: L'archetype du joueur (determine par le quiz) modifie le DC des jets et injecte du contexte specifique dans le RAG pour personnaliser la narration.

tasks.title: Aspects -> impact narratif + bonus/malus
tasks.description: Les etats des 3 aspects (Bas/Equilibre/Haut) doivent influencer la narration LLM et appliquer des bonus/malus mecaniques (ex: Corps Epuise = DC+2).

tasks.title: Premiere run skip Hub
tasks.description: A la toute premiere partie, permettre au joueur de sauter le Hub et aller directement en jeu pour une onboarding plus fluide.

domains.name: llm-lora
domains.description: LLM integration: LoRA v2, RAG archetype, prompt quality

tasks.title: LoRA v2 adapter integration
tasks.description: Integrer l'adapter LoRA v2 dans le pipeline Ollama. Ajouter le chargement conditionnel de l'adapter et le benchmark automatique.

tasks.title: RAG archetype injection
tasks.description: Enrichir le RAG v2.0 pour injecter le contexte d'archetype du joueur dans les prompts, personalisant la narration selon le profil.

domains.name: world-structure
domains.description: World structure: Bestiole refactor, semi-linear map, inter-run consequences

tasks.title: Refonte Bestiole (runes, sauveur)
tasks.description: Refactorer le systeme Bestiole: option de remplacement de compagnon, systeme de runes liees aux Oghams, role de sauveur lors des chutes critiques.

tasks.title: Structure semi-lineaire (carte noeuds)
tasks.description: Remplacer la progression lineaire par une carte a noeuds (style Slay the Spire) avec choix de chemin entre biomes.

tasks.title: Consequences long terme inter-runs
tasks.description: Implementer la persistance inter-runs: standing des factions, memoire du monde, deblocages permanents qui affectent les futures parties.

domains.name: visual-polish
domains.description: Visual polish: seasonal effects, portraits, shaders

tasks.title: Effets saisonniers menu
tasks.description: Ajouter des effets visuels saisonniers (particules neige/feuilles/fleurs/chaleur) au menu principal, pilotes par le calendrier in-game.

tasks.title: Art Kingdom Two Crowns (portraits)
tasks.description: Integrer les portraits style Kingdom Two Crowns pour les PNJ et Merlin. Pipeline: pixel art reference + shader + palette GBC.

domains.name: testing
domains.description: Test analysis: failures, regressions, coverage improvements

tasks.title: Analyze test failures
tasks.description: Read test_results.json and screenshots_report.json. Identify regressions, new failures, and flaky tests. Write fix_priorities.json with actionable items for each failing domain.

tasks.title: Improve test coverage
tasks.description: Add new test cases for untested edge cases discovered in this cycle's auto-play runs. Focus on aspect state transitions and ending triggers.

domains.name: game-design
domains.description: Game balance, fun factor, tone analysis from stats

tasks.title: Balance analysis from auto-play stats
tasks.description: Read stats_summary.json. Evaluate: Are endings diverse? Is life drain balanced? Are DC ranges producing 40-60% success? Is the Triade balanced? Write balance_report.md with specific constant adjustments.

tasks.title: Fun factor and tone evaluation
tasks.description: Read card texts from auto-play logs. Evaluate: Is the tone 'quirky & mysterious'? Are choices meaningful? Is there enough variety? Are the 3 options distinct? Write tone_report.md.

tasks.title: Propose balance adjustments
tasks.description: Based on GD.1 and GD.2, propose specific changes to merlin_constants.gd (DC ranges, life drain, souffle economy). Write proposed_changes.json for gameplay domain to apply next cycle.

domains.name: lore
domains.description: Lore development: narrative coherence, expansion, scenarios

tasks.title: Narrative coherence review
tasks.description: Read card texts from auto-play logs. Check: Does LLM output match established lore? Are there anachronisms? Does Merlin's voice stay consistent? Write lore_coherence_report.md.

tasks.title: Lore expansion from gameplay
tasks.description: Based on scenarios explored this cycle, expand relevant lore documents in docs/50_lore/. Add new NPC backstories, biome details, or Ogham secrets.

tasks.title: Scenario catalogue enrichment
tasks.description: Create new scenario entries in data/ai/scenarios/ inspired by narrative patterns observed. Each scenario needs: title, theme, 4 anchor contexts, act structure.
